body.title: OR tiered cascade: analyst→worker→minion before CC block
body.result: analyst→worker→minion cascade implemented; OR_TIER_ESCALATE channel events; escalation_history passthrough; 5 new tests
body.description:
Replace single-tier inference_dispatch_fn with a cascade: analyst→worker→minion. Each tier runs one full tool loop; on DONE close ticket; on ESCALATE try next tier with full escalation_history. When all tiers exhausted, block for CC with tier-by-tier failure summary including notes. OR_TIER_ESCALATE posted to channel on each hop. minion-tagged tickets skip to minion tier directly.

**Affected files:** devices/granny/dispatch.py
**Design rules:** no-sqlite; log every tier transition at WARNING
**Scope boundary:** IN: analyst→worker→minion cascade; escalation_history passthrough; OR_TIER_ESCALATE channel event; all-tiers-exhausted block with notes. OUT: per-tier max_iterations cap (future), tier selection by ticket size (future).
**Completion criteria:** 5 new cascade tests passing covering: analyst-first start, escalation_history passthrough, all-tiers-exhausted block, OR_TIER_ESCALATE channel post, minion-tag skip.
